bottlenecks.name: Review and approve request
bottlenecks.description: Bottleneck detected at process step 'Review and approve request' (queue_keyword, high_inbound_edges:2, handoff_inbound).
bottlenecks.impact: Affects 2 downstream node(s); inbound edges: 2, outbound edges: 1.
bottlenecks.root_cause_hypothesis: Step appears to involve approval, review, or queuing. Work accumulates at a handoff boundary.

redundancies.name: Duplicate data entry across systems
redundancies.description: The same data appears to be entered into multiple systems: Enter customer order into ERP; Log customer order in CRM.
redundancies.waste_estimate: Approximately 30 minute(s) of redundant effort per process run.

automation_opportunities.name: Send confirmation email to customer
automation_opportunities.roi: High (Approximately 50 minute(s) per week (daily). saved / Low effort)
automation_opportunities.suggested_approach: Automated email/Slack notification on status change
